title: verbascum globiferum
intro: Verbascum globiferum, also known as the Bear's Beard or Woolly Mullein, is a biennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Verbascum globiferum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects, providing health benefits such as reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Verbascum globiferum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used both internally and externally.
